home.title: Home
home.description: App Rust Nuxt Store - Your complete online store with the best products
home.autoImport: This is an automatically imported component

newsletter.title: Stay Ahead
newsletter.description: Subscribe to our newsletter and get exclusive access to news, special offers and early discounts.

shipping.title: Fast & Free Delivery
shipping.description: Free shipping on all orders over $200.00.

payments.title: Secure Payments
payments.description: Your data is always safe and encrypted.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.description: Our team is always here to help you.

hero.title: Elevating the E-commerce Experience
hero.description: We are more than just a store. We are a team of enthusiasts dedicated to bringing the best products combined with cutting-edge technology.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Founded in 2024, App Rust Nuxt Store started with a simple idea: to create a seamless shopping experience that combines the performance of Rust with the flexibility of Nuxt.
story.p2: What started as a small project has grown into a full-scale platform serving customers worldwide. We believe in quality, transparency, and innovation.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide an unparalleled shopping experience, selecting the best products and delivering them with speed and security.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become the leading e-commerce platform recognized for its technological excellence and customer-centric approach.

quality.title: Quality First
quality.description: We never compromise on the quality of our products.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Constantly improving our technology for better performance.

customerLove.title: Customer Focus
customerLove.description: Your satisfaction is our primary goal.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: Transparent and honest in all transactions.

cta.title: Want to know more about us?
cta.description: We are always open for questions and partnerships.
